title: Origins Redux
description: This is an Addon which adds multiple new origins for the fabric mod Origins!
body:
# 🌌 Origins Redux

_Add multiple custom Origins to expand your Minecraft experience!_

---

## 🩸 Oni  
**A fierce demon warrior with immense strength and durability, but cursed by sunlight and driven by a thirst for power.**

---

## ☠️ Offspring of Hades  
**Born of the underworld, you command the forces of death and darkness, but the light of the overworld weakens your infernal powers.**

---

## ✨ Celestial  
**A being of divine light, blessed with heavenly powers and protection, yet tethered to the mortal realm by a need to balance your celestial energy.**

---

## 🌑 Dark Elf  
**A master of stealth and shadow, thriving in darkness with agility and cunning, but vulnerable to the harshness of light.**

---

## 🌊 Demi-Human Whale  
**As a Demi-Human Whale, you blend the might of the ocean's giants with human adaptability. Glide through water, breathe underwater, and possess enhanced strength and speed.**

---

## 🔥 Wyvernchild  
**You are half human, half dragon — able to breathe fire, but weakened when exposed to water.**

---

## 🪨 Golem  
**The Golem Origin represents a being made of stone and geodes, blessed with enormous strength and resilience.**

---

## 🎲 Alea, the Dice Maiden  
**Alea is a master of fate and chance. Her powers are dictated by the roll of a die — each move a gamble with potential for great fortune or devastating loss.**

---

## 🕷️ Arachne  
**A creature half-human, half-spider that rules the web and the darkness.**

---

## 🦴 Undead Warrior 
**A forgotten soul wandering on earth.**

---

## 🪶 Phoenix
**A legendary firebird that is reborn from the ashes.**

---

## ⚡Storm Caller 
**A storm summoner who controls the power of lightning.**

---

> 🔑 When an Origin has **3 abilities**, a `ternary` key is included.

---

## 📌 Coming Soon  
**_More Origins will be added soon!_**
